labs.title: Why teens deserve access to safe AI
labs.summary: Learn how OpenAI is making ChatGPT safer for teens with age-appropriate protections, learning tools, parental controls, and expert partnerships.

labs.title: Our approach to bioresilience
labs.summary: The global biosecurity landscape is rapidly evolving. Today, Google DeepMind and Isomorphic Labs are sharing our joint approach to bioresilience . To support government bodies and non-profit organizations during novel outbreaks, Isomorphic Labs has established a focused unit to rapidly deploy its drug design engine to design medical countermeasures that could address both naturally occurring pandemics and potential…

labs.title: How Cars24 scales conversations and builds faster with OpenAI
labs.summary: Cars24 uses OpenAI-powered voice and chat agents to handle 1M+ monthly conversation minutes, recover 12% of lost leads, and bring agentic workflows to teams across the company.

labs.title: Towards demystifying the creativity of diffusion models
labs.summary: Zhengdao Chen, Research Scientist, Google Research We show that a diffusion model’s creativity (its ability to generate novel data, rather than just memorize its training set) is a mathematical consequence of neural networks learning a "smoothed" version of the score function, driving the model to interpolate between training data points along the hidden data manifold. In a diffusion model, the moving particles are…

labs.title: The US is advancing AI safety through state and federal action
labs.summary: OpenAI outlines a “reverse federalism” approach to AI governance, where state laws help build a national framework for safe, democratic AI.

labs.title: GPT-Red: Unlocking Self-Improvement for Robustness
labs.summary: Explore GPT-Red, OpenAI’s automated red teaming system that uses self-play to improve AI safety, alignment, and prompt injection robustness.

labs.title: How to manage AI investments in the agentic era
labs.summary: Learn how enterprises can manage AI investments in the agentic era by measuring useful work per dollar, improving efficiency, and scaling high-value workflows.

labs.title: How sales teams use ChatGPT Work
labs.summary: See how sales teams can use ChatGPT Work to create pipeline briefs, meeting prep packets, forecast reviews, account plans, and stalled-deal diagnoses from real work inputs.

labs.title: How data science teams use ChatGPT Work
labs.summary: See how data science teams can use ChatGPT Work to build root-cause briefs, impact readouts, KPI memos, scoped analyses, and dashboard specs from real work inputs.

labs.title: Empowering India’s next generation of innovators with ATL Saathi
labs.summary: Atal Tinkering Labs (ATL) is bringing access to new technology—such as 3D printing, IoT, and robotics—for over 1.1 crore students across India. The application provides summarized modules, AI-generated infographics, video overviews, and interactive quizzes for 12 core modules from the ATL prescribed curriculum. Powering the ATL Saathi, the Gemini model provides the underlying intelligence to transform tinkering labs…

labs.title: How Deutsche Telekom is rewiring telecommunications with AI
labs.summary: How Deutsche Telekom is becoming an AI-native telco with OpenAI-transforming customer service, employee workflows, network operations, and the future of voice.

labs.title: Getting started with ChatGPT
labs.summary: Learn how to use ChatGPT, start your first conversation, and discover simple ways to write, brainstorm, and solve problems with AI.

startups.title: San Francisco mayor pushes for tougher rules after the Waymo traffic fiasco
startups.summary: Mayor Lurie has asked state regulators to bolster rules for autonomous vehicles nearly two weeks after Waymo robotaxis became immobile in heavy July 4 traffic, ran out of power, and blocked key streets, further compounding the gridlock. The San Francisco Chronicle first reported on the letter . Six companies, including Nuro, Waymo, and Zoox, hold driverless testing permits, which allow the vehicles to drive without…

startups.title: SpaceX suddenly aborts second Starship V3 launch after ignition
startups.summary: SpaceX abruptly aborted the second attempted launch of its upgraded Starship rocket system on Thursday, just moments after the booster ignited at the company’s complex in South Texas. SpaceX won’t try to launch Starship again until next week, he wrote . This is also SpaceX’s first Starship test launch attempt since it went public on June 12 in the largest IPO in history.

startups.title: Coca-Cola suspended production at its Fairlife dairy after a ransomware attack
startups.summary: Securities and Exchange Commission that its Fairlife dairy company was hit by ransomware and that its production systems are affected. The company said that its Fairlife production operations across the United States are “temporarily suspended.” Fairlife’s operations in Canada are unaffected. Coca-Cola didn’t say when Fairlife’s systems would be restored.

startups.title: Founders Fund hires former OpenAI exec Ryan Beiermeister (and not because of her ‘Mafia’ skills)
startups.summary: Ryan Beiermeister has joined Founders Fund as a partner, she announced on Monday. Beiermeister played the game against OpenAI’s Sam Altman, Anduril’s Palmer Luckey, Figma’s Dylan Field, Flexport’s Ryan Petersen, Founders Fund’s Trae Stephens, and several others. Still, Beiermeister has known Trae Stephens for at least a decade.

startups.title: Google Vids now lets you star in your own AI videos
startups.summary: OpenAI’s Sora may have shut down , but Google apparently thinks there’s still interest in a tool that lets you star in your own AI videos. Omni then mixes those inputs together to create the AI video you want. The updates push Google Vids beyond its original role as an AI-assisted workplace presentation tool to become more of an all-in-one video creation platform.

startups.title: Roblox launches an AI-powered game-creation feature in its mobile app
startups.summary: Roblox announced Thursday a new feature called “Build,” allowing users to design games from their mobile devices using AI. The Build feature lets anyone turn simple text prompts into a basic game without any programming experience. Additionally, the announcement comes shortly after Roblox disclosed plans to discontinue “Roblox Connect,” the avatar-based video-calling feature introduced in 2023.

startups.title: Oil giant BP shutters its corporate venture arm after 20 years
startups.summary: Now it’s definitely “off.” On top of pivoting away from clean energy earlier this year, the oil giant announced today that it was selling the majority of its venture portfolio — more than 10 companies, according to BP — to Verdane , a Nordic private equity firm. Since BP launched its venture arm in 2007, it has invested in a wide range of industries, many of them focused on the energy transition, including green…

startups.title: Uber’s $14.8B Delivery Hero deal would nearly double its global footprint
startups.summary: After weeks of speculation, Uber officially agreed to acquire Delivery Hero, a purchase that will take the ride-hailing and delivery giant’s status to new heights, and to nearly 100 markets across Europe, the Middle East, Latin America, and Asia. German-based Delivery Hero also made a separate agreement to sell its business in 14 markets, where Uber Eats is already operating, to New York-based investment firm SSW…

startups.title: Newsletter platform Beehiiv now lets subscribers chat with each other, adds AI
startups.summary: The company also launched a new AI Copilot that helps creators manage and grow their audience. The updates come as Beehiiv positions itself as a creator platform beyond newsletters. Beehiiv’s new Community tool will allow users to spin up a discussion forum within the platform.

startups.title: X cracks down on creators who steal content
startups.summary: X is taking a tougher stance against people who try to abuse its creator revenue-sharing program by soliciting engagement and stealing content from others. It’s common for viral content to be recirculated, especially on platforms like X, where that content can be rewarded with likes, follows, and, in some cases, cold, hard cash . Bier has complained about engagement bait on the platform before, and even went after…

startups.title: AI-powered travel agency Fora hits unicorn status, raises $60M
startups.summary: Travel agency Fora announced a $60 million Series D round led by Forerunner and Tactile Ventures, valuing the company at $1 billion. Fora , founded in 2021, is a two-part platform: It lets people easily become travel agents by providing the infrastructure to support client communication and travel planning; it also lets users find and communicate with advisors as they plan trips for occasions like honeymoons or…

startups.title: Google’s AI Mode now lets you link and interact with select apps
startups.summary: At launch, supported apps include Instacart, Canva, and YouTube. Supported apps include Canva, OpenTable, Spark, Instacart, and more. Earlier this year, Google launched “Personal Intelligence” on AI Mode , enabling it to tap into users’ Gmail and Google Photos to provide more individualized responses.

wider_tech.summary: The self-cleaning hybrid vacuum and mop washes and dries its mop and climbs over raised thresholds. The self-cleaning hybrid vacuum and mop washes and dries its mop and climbs over raised thresholds. The bagless dock automatically empties the dustbin, then washes the mop with hot water and dries it.

wider_tech.title: Google is better than Apple at playing the AI regulations game
wider_tech.summary: Google scored a grace period to bring Android in line with EU rules, while Apple must make Siri AI compliant before launch. Google scored a grace period to bring Android in line with EU rules, while Apple must make Siri AI compliant before launch. Google has a year to bring Android into compliance while continuing to expand Gemini.

wider_tech.title: Decoy Font
wider_tech.summary: Decoy Font is constructed based on the technique behind hybrid images . However, where Ghost Font relies on a animation to disguise its message, Decoy Font works as a direct TTF font file and can be directly typed in projects. Using Decoy Font as a benchmark of text recognition LLMs would be interesting. (542 points, 126 comments on Hacker News)

wider_tech.title: NotebookLM is now Gemini Notebook
wider_tech.summary: We’re renaming NotebookLM to Gemini Notebook. Today, we’re renaming NotebookLM to Gemini Notebook. You can already access and create notebooks directly within the Gemini app, with full cross-app syncing between the Gemini app and the standalone Gemini Notebook experience. (301 points, 154 comments on Hacker News)
